data_endpoints.description: Full-universe LTHCS scores for the given trading day (equity universe — DJIA + NDX + S&P 100, deduped).
data_endpoints.shape: { calc_date, model_version, scores: [{ ticker, lthcs_score, band, subscores, modifiers, ... }] }

data_endpoints.description: Crypto-universe LTHCS scores for the given day (BTC, ETH, SOL, ADA, AVAX, DOT, LINK, POL, XRP, DOGE).
data_endpoints.shape: { calc_date, model_version, scores: [{ ticker, lthcs_score, band, subscores, ... }] }

data_endpoints.description: Per-ticker time series of composite scores + bands (append-only history file, one per ticker).
Templated per-ticker narrative blurbs for the given day (always available — no LLM required).
LLM-authored narratives for the given day. Gated — only present on days the LLM SHADOW path ran successfully.
Per-(ticker, pillar) breakdown of sub-scores + raw component values for the given day.
data_endpoints.shape: { calc_date, model_version, rows: [{ ticker, pillar, sub_score, components, data_quality }] }

data_endpoints.description: Backtest equity curve for a given run id (LTHCS-band-weighted vs. equal-weight + SPY baselines).
Pillar weights by maturity stage (equity + crypto profiles). Updated when the model is retuned.
data_endpoints.shape: { version, profiles: { <profile>: [w1, w2, w3, w4, w5] } }

data_endpoints.description: Bulk CSV export of the latest universe snapshot — one row per ticker, spreadsheet-ready (Excel / pandas / Sheets). Multi-value fields (dropped_pillars, data_quality_flags) are semicolon-joined.
data_endpoints.shape: header: ticker, calc_date, lthcs_score, band, confidence_level, adoption_momentum, institutional_confidence, financial_evolution, thesis_integrity, des, dropped_pillars, data_quality_flags, drift_1d, drift_7d, drift_30d, drift_90d, sector, maturity_stage

license: Read-only public mirror. Data is for informational use only — not investment advice.
